exitThisPage: I adael y gwasanaeth hwn yn gyflym, pwyswch escape dair gwaith.
doNotNeedToDecide: We do not need to decide this

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.check: Please check the web address is correct.

generic.title: Sorry, there is a problem with the service
generic.tryReloading: You can try reloading the page or start again.

rateLimit.title: Too many requests have been made
rateLimit.info: The page has been reloaded too many times in a short period.
rateLimit.tryReloading: Please wait a period of 15 minutes, then try reloading the page or start again.

timeOut.title: Sorry, you'll have to start again
timeOut.yourSession: Your session automatically ends if you don’t use the service for 120 minutes.
timeOut.personalInformation: We haven’t saved any personal information.
timeOut.startAgain: You need to start your child arrangement plan again.

cookieBanner.title: Cookies on Propose a child arrangements plan
cookieBanner.useEssentialCookies: We use some essential cookies to make this service work.
cookieBanner.useAnalyticsCookies: We’d also like to use analytics cookies so we can understand how you use the service and make improvements.
cookieBanner.acceptedAnalyticsCookies: You’ve accepted analytics cookies. You can change your cookie settings at any time.
cookieBanner.rejectedAnalyticsCookies: You’ve rejected analytics cookies. You can change your cookie settings at any time.

content.appliesTo: This accessibility statement applies to the 'Propose a child arrangements plan' service.
content.runBy: This website is run by the Ministry of Justice (MoJ). We want as many people as possible to be able to use this website. For example, that means you should be able to:

abilities.changeColours: change colours, contrast levels and fonts using browser or device settings
abilities.zoomIn: zoom in up to 400% without the text spilling off the screen
abilities.navigate: navigate most of the website using a keyboard or speech recognition software
abilities.listen: listen to most of the website using a screen reader (including the most recent versions of JAWS, NVDA and VoiceOver)

content.simpleText: We've also made the website text as simple as possible to understand.
content.abilityNet: AbilityNet has advice on making your device easier to use if you have a disability.

feedback.title: Feedback and contact information
feedback.contact: If you find any problems not listed on this page or think we're not meeting accessibility requirements, email feedback@propose-child-arrangements-plan.service.gov.uk.

enforcement.title: Enforcement procedure
enforcement.responsible: The Equality and Human Rights Commission (EHRC) is responsible for enforcing the Public Sector Bodies (Websites and Mobile Applications) (No. 2) Accessibility Regulations 2018 (the 'accessibility regulations').
enforcement.complaint: If you're not happy with how we respond to your complaint, contact the Equality Advisory and Support Service (EASS).

technical.title: Technical information about this website's accessibility
technical.commitment: The Ministry of Justice (MoJ) is committed to making its website accessible, in accordance with the Public Sector Bodies (Websites and Mobile Applications) (No. 2) Accessibility Regulations 2018.

compliance.title: Compliance status
compliance.tested: We have tested this service with assistive technologies including screen readers and voice-to-text technology.
compliance.wcag: The service has had an external WCAG accessibility audit by User Vision on 5th June.
compliance.compliant: The service is fully compliant and meets most of the requirements of the Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) 2.2 AA standard.

content.screenReader: Screen reader users may experience the following issues with the ‘Exit this page’ button, which allows you to leave the service quickly.

list.itemOne: The button can be activated by clicking the Escape key three times. As the Escape key is a common shortcut for exiting modals, the button may accidentally be activated.

content.deviatesFromGDS: This deviates from by GDS approach to use the Shift key. In user testing the ‘Exit this page’ button was accidentally activated, as it’s a common navigation shortcut. We are working with GDS to improve this experience with user feedback.

preparation.title: Preparation of this accessibility statement
preparation.preparedOn: This statement was prepared on 16 June 2026. It was last reviewed on 17 June 2026.
preparation.lastTested: This service was last tested in Summer 2026 against the WCAG 2.2 AA standard, by User Vision on 5 June 2026.

contactUs.title: Cysylltu â ni
contactUs.reportProblem: I roi gwybod am broblem neu i awgrymu gwelliannau i'r gwasanaeth hwn, gallwch anfon e-bost at:
contactUs.onlyUseForFeedback: Dim ond i roi adborth ar y gwasanaeth digidol y dylid defnyddio'r cyfeiriad e-bost hwn.
contactUs.cannotAnswerQuestions: Ni allwn ateb unrhyw gwestiynau am gynlluniau trefniadau plant sydd wedi eu creu'n barod.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.name: Name
cookies.aboutCookies:
Propose a child arrangements plan puts small files (known as ‘cookies’) onto your computer to collect information about how you browse the service.

Cookies are used to:

  • remember your progress
  • measure how you use the service so it can be updated and improved based on your needs

Propose a child arrangements plan cookies aren't used to identify you personally.

You'll normally see a message before we store a cookie on your computer.

Find out more about how to manage cookies.
cookies.howCookiesAreUsed: How cookies are used in this service
cookies.essentialCookiesUse: Essential cookies are needed for the service to work. We do not need to ask for permission to use them.
cookies.rememberingProgress:
Remembering your progress

We will store cookies to remember your application progress in this computer and to expire your session after 120 minutes of inactivity or when you close your browser.
cookies.sessionPurpose: Saves your current progress in this computer and tracks inactivity periods
cookies.sessionExpiry: After 120 minutes of inactivity or when you close your browser
cookies.cookiesMessage:
Cookies message

You may see a banner when you visit Propose a child arrangements plan inviting you to accept or reject optional cookies. We’ll set a cookies so that your computer knows you’ve seen it and not to show it again, and also to store your settings.
cookies.aboutOptionalCookies:
Measuring service usage (Google Analytics)

We use Google Analytics software to collect information about how you use Propose a child arrangements plan. We do this to help make sure the service meets the needs of its users and to help us make improvements

Google Analytics stores information about:

  • the pages you visit
  • how long you spend on each page
  • how you got to the service
  • what you click on while you’re visiting the service

We don't collect or store your personal information (for example your name or address) so this information can't be used to identify who you are.

Google Analytics sets the following cookies:
cookies.acceptOptionalCookies: Do you want to accept analytics cookies?
cookies._gaCookiePurpose: Checks if you’ve visited the service before. This helps us count how many people visit our site.
cookies._ga_IdCookiePurpose: Used by Google Analytics to find and track an individual session with your device.

content.collectData: We also use OpenSearch to collect  data about how the service is used, such as:
content.doesNotUseCookies: OpenSearch analytics does not use cookies or store information on your device.
content.monitor: This data is used only by the Ministry of Justice to monitor and improve the service.

surveys.title: Surveys (optional)
surveys.intro: We will sometimes ask users to take part in a survey, for example our performance survey. If you take part, or dismiss the survey, we’ll save a cookie that lets us know you’ve seen the message so that we do not show it to you again.

valueRowOne.name: govuk_taken[NameOfSurvey]
valueRowOne.purpose: Remembers whether you have taken the survey or dismissed it

valueRowTwo.name: govuk_surveySeen[NameOfSurvey]
valueRowTwo.purpose: Remembers how many times you have seen the survey message

surveys.smartSurvey: We use SmartSurvey to collect responses to the survey. If you take part, SmartSurvey will save extra cookies to track your progress on their website.

privacyNotice.title: Hysbysiad Preifatrwydd
privacyNotice.committedToSecurity: Mae'r Weinyddiaeth Gyfiawnder (MoJ) wedi ymrwymo i ddiogelu a chadw eich gwybodaeth bersonol yn saff.
privacyNotice.describeHowAndWhy: Mae'r hysbysiad hwn yn disgrifio sut a phryd y defnyddir gwybodaeth o'r fath gennym. Mae'r hysbysiad preifatrwydd hwn yn disgrifio sut rydym yn casglu ac yn defnyddio gwybodaeth bersonol yn ystod ac ar ôl eich perthynas â ni, yn unol â chyfraith diogelu data. Caiff yr hysbysiad hwn ei ddiweddaru'n rheolaidd.
privacyNotice.typesOfPersonalData:
Math o ddata personol rydym yn ei brosesu

Ar hyn o bryd rydym yn casglu ac yn defnyddio'r wybodaeth ganlynol:

  • enw cyntaf y ddau riant neu ofalwyr
  • enwau cyntaf pob plentyn

Rydym yn casglu a phrosesu gwybodaeth sy'n ymwneud â chynllunio trefniadau plant i'ch helpu i greu cynllun trefniadau plant wedi'i addasu. Fodd bynnag, nid ydym yn casglu gwybodaeth sy'n eich adnabod yn bersonol (PII), fel enwau, cyfeiriadau neu fanylion cyswllt.

Gan nad ydym yn casglu gwybodaeth y gellir ei defnyddio i'ch adnabod chi, nid yw llawer o hawliau diogelu data yn berthnasol. Rydym yn eich annog i beidio cynnwys y math hyn o fanylion yn eich cynllun. Cyn belled nad ydych yn rhoi gwybodaeth na ofynnir amdani yn y gwasanaeth, nid ydym yn casglu digon o wybodaeth i wybod pwy ydych chi.

Gall y mathau o wybodaeth a gesglir gennym nad yw'n eich adnabod yn bersonol gynnwys:

  • manylion cyffredinol am drefniadau plant, fel trefniadau a ffefrir a lleoliadau casglu
  • cyswllt a ffefrir gennych
  • rhyngweithiad defnyddwyr gyda'n platfform, gan gynnwys ymddygiad llywio a defnydd nodwedd, i wella ein gwasanaeth
privacyNotice.howWeGetPersonalData:
Sut rydym yn cael eich data personol a pham ei fod gennym

Mae'r rhan fwyaf o'r wybodaeth bersonol rydym yn ei phrosesu yn cael ei darparu'n uniongyrchol gennych chi. Mae'r wybodaeth a ddarperir gennych yn cael ei defnyddio i lunio cynllun trefniadau plant y gallwch lawrlwytho a rhannu gyda'ch cyd-riant. Mae'r wybodaeth a ddarperir gennych yn caniatáu i ni drefnu'r cynllun yn seiliedig ar eich anghenion penodol, gan sicrhau ei fod yn adlewyrchu'r trefniadau a fwriedir gennych i'ch plant.

Mae casglu'r data hwn yn hanfodol i:

  • bersonoli'r cynllun ar gyfer eich sefyllfa rhianta
  • sicrhau bod dogfen y cynllun wedi'i lawrlwytho a lunir gennych yn cynnwys yr holl fanylion sydd eu hangen arnoch i gefnogi eich trefniadau cyd-rianta
  • darparu fersiwn o'r cynllun i chi y gellir ei lawrlwytho er mwyn gallu cyfeirio ato a'i rannu

Rydym ond yn casglu'r wybodaeth sy'n ofynnol i greu eich cynllun trefniadau plant ac nid ydym yn ei defnyddio at unrhyw ddiben arall heb eich caniatâd.

Nid ydym yn rhannu'r wybodaeth a ddarperir gennych gydag unrhyw sefydliad nac adran arall o'r llywodraeth. Defnyddir y manylion a roddir gennych i greu eich cynllun trefniadau plant ar gyfer creu eich dogfen cynllun wedi'i bersonoli i chi yn unig.

O dan Reoliad Diogelu Data Cyffredinol y DU (GDPR y DU), y seiliau cyfreithlon yr ydym yn dibynnu arnynt ar gyfer prosesu'r wybodaeth hon yw eich caniatâd chi. Gallwch dynnu eich caniatâd yn ôl ar unrhyw adeg. Y ffordd haws o wneud hyn yw dileu'r cwcis porwr. Mae yna wybodaeth am sut i wneud hyn yma.

Os ydych eisiau gofyn i ni ddileu eich data cwcis, cysylltwch â ni.
privacyNotice.internationalTransfers:
International data transfers

There are no international transfers.
privacyNotice.howWeStorePersonalData:
Sut rydym yn storio eich data personol

Personal data is stored only while you create your plan and for up to 30 days afterwards.
privacyNotice.howToComplain:
Sut i gwyno

Os oes gennych unrhyw bryderon am ein defnydd o'ch data personol, gallwch gysylltu â swyddog diogelu data'r MoJ:

Data Protection Officer
Ministry of Justice
10th Floor, Post Point 10.31
102 Petty France
London
SW1H 9AJ

dpo@justice.gov.uk

Gallwch hefyd gwyno i'r ICO os ydych yn anhapus gyda sut rydym wedi defnyddio eich data.

Swyddfa'r Comisiynydd Gwybodaeth
Wycliffe House
Water Lane
Wilmslow
Swydd Gaer
SK9 5AF

Rhifau llinellau cymorth: 0303 123 1113
Gwefan ICO:https://www.ico.org.uk
privacyNotice.preparedDate: Cafodd y datganiad hwn ei baratoi ar 7 Ionawr 2026.

termsAndConditions.title: Telerau ac amodau
termsAndConditions.agree: Trwy ddefnyddio'r gwasanaeth hwn rydych yn cytuno i'r telerau ac amodau hyn.
termsAndConditions.accurateAndComplete: Y Weinyddiaeth Gyfiawnder sy'n cynnal y gwasanaeth hwn. Rydym yn ceisio sicrhau bod yr wybodaeth a ddarperir gennym yn gywir ac yn gyflawn a bod y gwasanaeth bob amser ar gael a heb firysau.
termsAndConditions.noLiabilityFor: Nid yw'r Weinyddiaeth Gyfiawnder yn derbyn unrhyw gyfrifoldeb:
termsAndConditions.unableToAccess: os nad ydych yn gallu cael mynediad i'r gwasanaeth (er enghraifft oherwydd galw mawr neu oherwydd ein bod wedi'i atal ar gyfer gwaith cynnal)
termsAndConditions.indirectDamages: niwed anuniongyrchol sy'n codi drwy ddefnyddio'r gwasanaeth neu'n dibynnu ar y cynnwys
termsAndConditions.externalSites: cynnwys ac argaeledd gwefannau allanol â dolenni i'r gwasanaeth neu o'r gwasanaeth
termsAndConditions.informationAboutYouHeading: Gwybodaeth amdanoch chi a'ch ymweliadau â'r wefan
termsAndConditions.informationAboutYou: Rydym yn casglu gwybodaeth amdanoch yn unol â'n polisi preifatrwydd a'n polisi cwcis. Drwy ddefnyddio'r gwasanaeth hwn rydych yn cytuno i ni gasglu'r wybodaeth hon a chadarnhau bod unrhyw ddata a ddarperir gennych yn gywir.
termsAndConditions.limitations: Nid yw defnyddio'r gwasanaeth hwn yn gwarantu y gallwch ddatrys eich trefniadau plant ar y gwasanaeth neu heb fynd i'r llys. Tra bod yr adnodd hwn wedi'i ddylunio i'ch helpu i greu cynllun trefniadau plant, bydd rhai achosion angen eu datrys mewn ffyrdd eraill, efallai drwy fynd i'r llys.
termsAndConditions.notLegallyEnforceable: Nid yw unrhyw drefniant a gyrhaeddir gennych drwy'r gwasanaeth hwn yn cael ei orfodi'n gyfreithiol mewn llys. Mae hyn yn golygu nad oes unrhyw ofyniad cyfreithiol i chi na'r rhiant neu ofalwr arall gydymffurfio gyda'r hyn y cytunwyd arno gennych.
termsAndConditions.misuse: Ni ddylech ddynwared unrhyw berson arall, darparu gwybodaeth ffug neu gamarweiniol na defnyddio'r gwasanaeth hwn ar ran rhywun arall heb eu caniatâd.
termsAndConditions.restrictionsOnUse: Os oes gennych orchymyn llys mewn lle sy'n cyfyngu eich cysylltiad gyda'r rhiant arall neu'r plentyn, fel gorchymyn dim cyswllt, gorchymyn rhag molestu neu unrhyw gyfyngiad cyfreithiol arall, ni ddylech ddefnyddio'r gwasanaeth hwn i gysylltu â nhw. Gall gwneud hynny dorri'r gorchymyn a gall olygu canlyniadau cyfreithiol. Os ydych yn ansicr pa un a yw unrhyw orchymyn llys neu gyfyngiad cyfreithiol arall yn effeithio ar eich gallu i ddefnyddio'r gwasanaeth hwn, dylech ofyn am gyngor cyfreithiol cyn parhau.

safetyCheck.title: Eich diogelwch
safetyCheck.rightInformation: We ask this so we can give you the right information and resources for your situation. Your answer will not be saved or shared with anyone
safetyCheck.intro: There may have been domestic abuse in the relationship if you have experienced any of the following:

bullets.violence: Abuse or violence, including physical, emotional and sexual
bullets.coercive: Coercive control and psychological abuse (threats, humiliation, intimidation, degradation, isolation and control)

safetyCheck.formHeading: Select whether you have experienced abuse from your ex-partner
safetyCheck.answerYes: Answer 'Yes' if you have experienced any of the above, whether or not you have reported your experience to the police.
safetyCheck.error: Dewiswch a ydych chi'n teimlo'n ddiogel ac yn hyderus ai peidio

notSafe.title: Getting help if you have experienced abuse

content.mayNotBeRightForYou: This service may not be right for you if you’ve experienced domestic abuse.
content.warningText: If you are in immediate danger, call 999 and ask for the police.
content.continueDescription: If you feel confident that you can carry on without any danger to yourself or the children, you can continue using the service.
content.description: You may have been in an abusive relationship. Domestic abuse or violence is a crime. Domestic abuse does not only mean physical violence – it includes emotional, sexual, psychological and financial abuse, as well as harassment and stalking.
content.descriptionSupport: It is important to remember that there is help and support available to you.

wantToContinue.title: If you want to continue using this service
wantToContinue.description: If you feel confident that you can carry on without any danger to yourself or the children, you can continue using the service.

getHelpProtecting.title: Get help protecting yourself and your children

content.abusiveRelationship: You may have been in an abusive relationship. Domestic abuse or violence is a crime. You can find out how to recognise domestic abuse.
content.domesticAbuse: If you have experienced any kind of domestic abuse, you can get a court order to protect you or your child.
content.citizensAdvice: Citizens Advice has advice on making child arrangements when there's been domestic abuse.
content.findOut: Find out how to get help with domestic abuse.
content.specificHelp: If you want to access help specifically to cater to your background and needs or want support and help for specific types of abuse there are several organisations that can help - see Domestic abuse: specialist sources of support.

helpAndSupport.title: Help and support
helpAndSupport.description: There is free, confidential support available to help you and your family.

rowOne.heading: Refuge National Domestic Abuse Helpline
rowOne.data:
Free, confidential advice, 24 hours a day if you need help understanding your options, finding a refuge space or other specialist services.

Telephone: 0808 2000 247

rowTwo.heading: Rights of Women
rowTwo.data:
Family law advice from a charity dedicated to providing free and confidential legal advice to women experiencing all forms of violence in England and Wales.

Telephone: 020 7251 6577

rowThree.heading: Men's Advice Line
rowThree.data:
A supportive helpline for all male victims of domestic abuse and those supporting them.

Telephone: 0808 801 0327

childrenSafetyCheck.title: Have the children ever been at risk?
childrenSafetyCheck.rightInformation: We ask this so we can give you the right information and resources for your situation. Your answer will not be saved or shared with anyone
childrenSafetyCheck.intro: Children may be at risk if there has been:

bullets.domesticAbuse: any form of domestic abuse or violence, even if the abuse was not directed at the children
bullets.substances: misuse of drugs, alcohol or other substances
bullets.otherConcerns: any other safety or welfare concerns that place anyone at significant risk of harm

childrenSafetyCheck.formHeading: Select whether the children have ever been at risk
childrenSafetyCheck.error: Select whether the children have ever been at risk

childrenNotSafe.title: Getting help if your children are not safe

content.mayNotBeAppropriate: It may not be appropriate to make child arrangements if there’s any risk of harm to the children.
content.warningText: If a child is in immediate danger, call 999 and ask for the police.
content.continueDescription: If you feel confident that you can carry on without any danger to yourself or the children, you can continue using the service.

getHelpProtecting.title: Get help protecting your children
getHelpProtecting.importantToRemember: It is important to remember that there is help and support available to you if your children are unsafe.
getHelpProtecting.experiencedAbuse: If you have experienced any kind of domestic abuse, you can get a court order to protect you or your child.
getHelpProtecting.findOut: You can find out what to do if you believe a child could be taken or has been taken abroad without your permission.

helpAndSupport.title: Help and support
helpAndSupport.description: There is free, confidential support available to help you and your family.

rowOne.heading: Refuge National Domestic Abuse Helpline
rowOne.data:
Free, confidential advice, 24 hours a day, if you need help understanding your options, finding a refuge space or other specialist services.

Telephone: 0808 2000 247

rowTwo.heading: Rights of Women
rowTwo.data:
Family law advice from a charity dedicated to providing free and confidential legal advice to women experiencing all forms of violence in England and Wales.

Telephone: 020 7251 6577

rowThree.heading: Reunite International Child Abduction Centre
rowThree.data:
An independent charity that provides advice and support on the issues surrounding the international movement of children.

Telephone: 0116 2556 234

doWhatsBest.title: Beth sydd orau i'r plant?
doWhatsBest.content:
Dylai eich cynllun trefniadau plant:

  • roi lles y plentyn yn gyntaf
  • adlewyrchu dymuniadau, teimladau ac anghenion y plentyn
  • ystyried unrhyw niwed y mae'r plentyn wedi'i ddioddef neu unrhyw risg o niwed

Awgrymiadau i rieni o safbwynt plentyn.
doWhatsBest.childrensNeedsFirst: Byddaf yn rhoi anghenion fy mhlant yn gyntaf

courtOrderCheck.title: A oes gorchymyn llys ar waith sy'n ymwneud â chi, y rhiant arall neu'r plant?
courtOrderCheck.subText:
Er enghraifft:

  • gorchymyn trefniadau plant
  • gorchymyn mater penodol
  • gorchymyn camau gwaharddedig
  • gorchymyn amddiffynnol fel gorchymyn rhag molestu, gorchymyn anheddu neu orchymyn diogelu rhag cam-drin domestig
  • unrhyw orchymyn arall sy'n cyfyngu ar gyswllt rhyngoch chi a'r rhiant arall neu'r plant
courtOrderCheck.error: Dewiswch p'un a oes gennych chi orchymyn llys ar waith

existingCourtOrder.title: Peidiwch â pharhau
existingCourtOrder.doNotUse: Peidiwch â defnyddio'r gwasanaeth hwn os oes gennych orchymyn llys ar waith.
existingCourtOrder.getHelpChangingCourtOrder: Ceisiwch gymorth ar newid neu orfodi gorchymyn llys.

numberOfChildren.emptyError: Nodwch faint o blant y mae'r cytundeb hwn ar eu cyfer
numberOfChildren.tooFewError: Your agreement must be for at least 1 child
numberOfChildren.tooManyError: Your agreement cannot be for more than 6 children

about.notStoreInfo: Nid ydym yn cadw'r wybodaeth hon nac yn ei rhannu ag adrannau eraill y llywodraeth.

aboutTheAdults.initialParentFirstNameHint: Os ydych chi'n ateb y cwestiynau hyn ar ran rhywun arall, nodwch eu henw cyntaf
aboutTheAdults.secondaryParentFirstName: Enw cyntaf y rhiant neu'r gofalwr arall

mostlyLive.anotherArrangement: Trefniant arallSelecting this will reveal an additional input
mostlyLive.emptyError: Choose where the children will spend most of their time
mostlyLive.arrangementMissingError: Describe the living arrangement you are proposing

whichSchedule.title: Pa amserlen sy'n gweddu orau i anghenion y plant?
whichSchedule.commonSchedules:
Dyma rai amserlenni cyffredin a all weithio'n dda i blant.

Bob yn ail wythnos
Bydd y plant yn treulio un wythnos mewn un cartref a'r wythnos nesaf yn y llall.

Amserlen 2-2-3
Bydd y plant yn treulio dau ddiwrnod mewn un cartref, dau ddiwrnod yn y llall, yna'n ôl i'r cartref cyntaf am 3 diwrnod gan gynnwys y penwythnos.

Amserlen 4-4-3
Bydd y plant yn treulio tri diwrnod mewn un cartref ac yna pedwar diwrnod yn y llall. Yr wythnos wedyn bydd fel arall.

Amserlen 2-2-5-5
Bydd y plant yn treulio dau ddiwrnod mewn un cartref, yna dau ddiwrnod yn y llall. Ar ôl hynny byddant yn treulio pum diwrnod mewn un cartref, yna pum diwrnod yn y llall.
whichSchedule.exactSplitWarning: Nid yw rhannu amser yn gyfartal rhwng dau gartref bob amser yn addas i fudd gorau plant.
whichSchedule.error: Describe which schedule will best meet the children's needs

willOvernightsHappen.title: A fydd y plant yn aros dros nos gyda {{{ adult }}}?
willOvernightsHappen.error: Dewiswch p'un a fydd y plant yn aros dros nos

whichDaysOvernight.title: Ar pa ddyddiau fydd aros dros nos yn digwydd?
whichDaysOvernight.emptyError: Dewiswch pa ddyddiau fydd y plant yn aros dros nos
whichDaysOvernight.arrangementMissingError: Nodwch fanylion y trefniadau dros nos
whichDaysOvernight.multiSelectedError: Describe what other arrangement you are proposing

willDaytimeVisitsHappen.title: A fydd y plant yn ymweld â {{{ adult }}} yn ystod y dydd?
willDaytimeVisitsHappen.error: Dewiswch p'un a fydd y plant yn cael ymweliadau yn ystod y dydd

whichDaysDaytimeVisits.title: Ar pa ddyddiau fydd ymweliadau yn ystod y dydd yn digwydd?
whichDaysDaytimeVisits.emptyError: Dewiswch pa ddyddiau fydd y plant yn ymweld yn ystod y dydd
whichDaysDaytimeVisits.arrangementMissingError: Nodwch fanylion y trefniadau ymweld yn ystod y dydd
whichDaysDaytimeVisits.multiSelectedError: Describe what other arrangement you are proposing

getBetweenHouseholds.title: Sut fydd y plant yn mynd o un cartref i'r llall?
getBetweenHouseholds.emptyError: Dewiswch sut fydd y plant yn mynd o un cartref i'r llall?
getBetweenHouseholds.arrangementMissingError: Disgrifiwch sut fydd y plant yn mynd o un cartref i'r llall?

whereHandover.title: Ble mae'r trosglwyddo'n digwydd?
whereHandover.explainer: Efallai y bydd yn haws i'r plant os bydd y trosglwyddo'n digwydd mewn lleoliad niwtral lle rydych chi'n hyderus y byddwch chi'ch dau yn teimlo'n ddiogel.
whereHandover.otherLabel: Describe where handover will take place
whereHandover.someoneElse: Someone else will manage handover, such as a grandparent
whereHandover.someoneElseName: Name of the person who will manage handover
whereHandover.otherMissingError: Describe where handover will take place

willChangeDuringSchoolHolidays.title: A fydd y trefniadau hyn yn newid yn ystod gwyliau'r ysgol?
willChangeDuringSchoolHolidays.error: Dewiswch p'un a fydd y trefniadau'n newid yn ystod gwyliau'r ysgol

howChangeDuringSchoolHolidays.title: Sut fydd y trefniadau'n newid yn ystod gwyliau'r ysgol?
howChangeDuringSchoolHolidays.content: Mae gwyliau ysgol yn cynnwys hanner tymor, gwyliau banc a diwrnodau HMS.
howChangeDuringSchoolHolidays.error: Disgrifiwch y trefniant rydych chi'n cynnig

itemsForChangeover.title: Pa eitemau sydd angen mynd o un cartref i'r llall?
itemsForChangeover.content: Mae eitemau'n cynnwys dillad, cit chwaraeon, offer ysgol, teganau a dyfeisiau electronig, meddyginiaethau ac eitemau gofal personol fel brwsys dannedd.
itemsForChangeover.error: Rhestrwch pa eitemau sydd angen mynd o un cartref i'r llall?

whatWillHappen.title: Beth fydd yn digwydd ar ddyddiau arbennig?
whatWillHappen.content: Cadwch anghenion a buddiannau gorau eich plant wrth wraidd eich cynlluniau ar gyfer gwyliau a digwyddiadau pwysig. Er enghraifft, dathliadau'r Flwyddyn Newydd, Sul y Mamau a Sul y Tadau, a phenblwyddi.
whatWillHappen.error: Disgrifiwch beth rydych chi'n ei gynnig fydd yn digwydd ar ddiwrnodau arbennig

whatOtherThingsMatter.title: Pa bethau eraill sy'n bwysig i'ch plant?
whatOtherThingsMatter.thingsToAgree: Efallai yr hoffech chi gytuno ar bethau fel:
whatOtherThingsMatter.religionDietAndRules: arferion crefyddol, diet, a rheolau safonol ar draws y ddau gartref
whatOtherThingsMatter.friendsAndFamily: mynediad at ffrindiau a theulu eraill
whatOtherThingsMatter.otherContact: mathau eraill o gyswllt, fel galwadau fideo
whatOtherThingsMatter.error: Disgrifiwch pa bethau eraill sy'n bwysig i'ch plant?

planLastMinuteChanges.title: Sut dylid cyfathrebu newidiadau munud olaf?
planLastMinuteChanges.howChangesCommunicatedAdditionalDescript: Bydd adegau pan fydd angen newid cynlluniau, fel os bydd un rhiant yn sâl yn ddi-rybudd ac yn methu casglu plentyn o'r ysgol.
planLastMinuteChanges.emptyError: Select a method for how you both communicate changes
planLastMinuteChanges.descriptionEmptyError: Describe how you will communicate changes
planLastMinuteChanges.selectOneOptionError: Describe what other arrangement you are proposing

planLongTermNotice.title: Faint o rybudd dylech roi i newid trefniadau hirdymor?
planLongTermNotice.sometimesYouNeedToPlanAhead: Weithiau efallai y bydd angen i chi gynllunio ymhell ymlaen llaw. Er enghraifft, os ydych chi eisiau cynllunio gwyliau yn ystod amser nad ydych chi fel arfer yn ei dreulio gyda'r plant.
planLongTermNotice.selectOneOptionError: Dewiswch faint o rybudd sydd ei angen ar gyfer gwneud newidiadau i drefniadau hirdymor
planLongTermNotice.descriptionEmptyError: Describe what is the other arrangement you are proposing

planReview.title: Pryd hoffech chi adolygu'r cynllun hwn?
planReview.childrensNeedsChange: Mae anghenion plant yn newid wrth iddynt dyfu. Pryd dylech chi adolygu'r cytundeb hwn i wirio ei fod yn dal i fod yr hyn sydd orau i'r plant?
planReview.youCanAlsoReview: Gallwch hefyd adolygu'r trefniadau hyn yn gynharach os nad ydynt bellach yn diwallu anghenion eich plant.
planReview.bothFilledError: Enter months or years, not both
planReview.notNumberError: Your answer must be a number
planReview.notIntError: Your answer must be a whole number. For example, 3.

sharePlan.title: Rydych chi wedi creu cynllun trefniadau plant arfaethedig
sharePlan.sendToSecondary: Lawrlwythwch fersiwn PDF neu HTML hygyrch o'r cynllun hwn a'i rannu gyda {{{ otherAdult }}}.
sharePlan.collaborate: Gallwch gydweithredu â {{{ otherAdult }}} i greu fersiwn rydych chi'ch dau yn cytuno ag o.
sharePlan.tryMediation: If {{{ otherAdult }}} does not respond or you can't make an agreement between yourselves, you could try mediation or another way of agreeing outside of court.
sharePlan.aMediatorIs: A mediator is a professional who will work with you to help you make decisions based on your child’s best interests. They listen to both of you and take a neutral approach.
sharePlan.ifYouCannotAgree: Find out more about what to do if you cannot agree.

whatWeAreTelling.proposedPlan: {{{ senderName }}} has suggested a child arrangements plan
whatWeAreTelling.senderHasUsedThe: {{{ senderName }}} used the Child Arrangements Plan service (https://propose-child-arrangements-plan.service.gov.uk/) on GOV.UK to suggest a plan for how you both might look after {{{ childrenNames }}}.
whatWeAreTelling.howToRespond: How to respond to this plan
whatWeAreTelling.pleaseReadThrough: You can read their suggested plan and use it to collaborate to create child arrangements which you both agree on.
whatWeAreTelling.notLegallyBinding: This plan is not legally binding and you do not have to do what it says.
whatWeAreTelling.ifYouDontAgree: If you don’t agree, you can:
whatWeAreTelling.useThisForm: use this form to suggest changes to {{{ senderName }}}'s proposed child arrangements plan
whatWeAreTelling.startYourOwn: start your own proposed child arrangements plan on GOV.UK or find a similar service
whatWeAreTelling.makeAWrittenAgreement: make a written agreement of your own without using any service or template
whatWeAreTelling.shouldOnlyRespond: You should only respond to the suggested plan if:
whatWeAreTelling.confident: you’re confident that you and your ex-partner can make decisions together without putting yourself or the children in danger
whatWeAreTelling.doNotFeelPressured: you do not feel pressured or intimidated into responding
whatWeAreTelling.stopIfAnyConcern: If you have any concerns about safety, stop now.
whatWeAreTelling.feedbackOrSafetyConcerns: If you have any feedback or safety concerns about this service, you can email safety@propose-child-arrangements-plan.service.gov.uk.
whatWeAreTelling.cannotAnswerQuestions: We cannot answer any questions about child arrangement plans that have already been created.
whatWeAreTelling.benefitsHeading: How making a child arrangements plan can help
whatWeAreTelling.mightFind: You may find that collaborating with {{{ senderName }}} on a child arrangements plan:
whatWeAreTelling.takesAround: is cheaper and quicker than going to court (it usually takes around 10 months to get a court order, depending on where you live and whether it’s urgent)
whatWeAreTelling.bestOutcome: leads to a better outcome for your children, which you and your ex-partner are in control of
whatWeAreTelling.goingToCourt: Going to court can sometimes mean you are not the ones who make the final decisions about your child arrangements.
whatWeAreTelling.topTips: Tips to help you and your children
whatWeAreTelling.wishes: reflect the wishes, feelings and needs of the child
whatWeAreTelling.considerAnyHarm: consider any harm the child has suffered or any risk of harm
whatWeAreTelling.ifThereIsCourt: If there is a court order in place
whatWeAreTelling.doNotContinue: Do not continue if there’s a court order in place relating to you, the other parent, or the children.
whatWeAreTelling.protectiveOrder: protective order such as a non-molestation order, occupation order or a domestic abuse protection order
whatWeAreTelling.anyOther: any other order restricting contact between you and the other parent or the children
whatWeAreTelling.toChange: To change or enforce an existing child arrangements order, visit https://www.gov.uk/looking-after-children-divorce/change-or-enforce-an-order.
whatWeAreTelling.moreInfo: Use GOV.UK to find more information, for example:
whatWeAreTelling.findLegalAdviser: You can find a legal adviser: https://www.gov.uk/find-legal-advice/find-legal-adviser.
whatWeAreTelling.signsAndEffects: To find out more about signs and effects of child abuse and neglect, visit https://www.nspcc.org.uk/what-is-child-abuse.
whatWeAreTelling.unsureVictim: If you’re unsure whether you’re a victim of domestic abuse, visit https://www.gov.uk/guidance/domestic-abuse-how-to-get-help#recognise-domestic-abuse.
whatWeAreTelling.notSuitableHeading: This plan is not suitable for you if there has been:
whatWeAreTelling.anyForm: any form of domestic abuse or violence, even if the abuse was not directed at the children
whatWeAreTelling.drugsOrAlcohol: misuse of drugs, alcohol or other substances
whatWeAreTelling.anyOtherSafety: any other safety or welfare concerns that place anyone at significant risk of harm
whatWeAreTelling.toAskForHelp: To ask for help using this service, or suggest improvements, you can email feedback@propose-child-arrangements-plan.service.gov.uk.
whatWeAreTelling.weCannot: We cannot answer any questions about child arrangement plans that have already been created.

yourProposedPlan.senderSuggestedDoNotDecide: {{{ senderName }}} suggested that this does not need to be decided.
yourProposedPlan.noCourtOrder: there is no court order in place at this time
yourProposedPlan.forOneChild: this is a proposed child arrangements plan for 1 child, {{{ childName }}}
yourProposedPlan.forMultipleChildren: this is a proposed child arrangements plan for {{ numberOfChildren }} children, {{{ childrenNames }}}
yourProposedPlan.agreementBetween: this agreement is between {{{ senderName }}} and {{{ otherAdultName }}}, who are the adults who will care for {{{ childrenNames }}}
yourProposedPlan.doYouAgreeOnBasics: Do you and {{{ senderName }}} agree about the children’s names, your names, and whether there is a court order in place?
yourProposedPlan.doNotStoreNames: We do not store these names or share any of this information with other government departments.
yourProposedPlan.doNotAgreeOnBasics: If you answered ‘No’, it may be helpful to find a mediator who can help you agree your child arrangements. You can get financial help with this. To find out more, go to https://www.gov.uk/looking-after-children-divorce.

livingAndVisiting.suggestedLiveWith: {{{ senderName }}} suggested that the children spend most of their time with {{{ adult }}}.
livingAndVisiting.suggestedLiveWithChild: {{{ senderName }}} suggested that {{{ childName }}} mostly lives with {{{ adult }}}.
livingAndVisiting.suggestedLiveWithOtherChildren: {{{ senderName }}} suggested that the other children mostly live with {{{ adult }}}.
livingAndVisiting.suggestedSplit: {{{ senderName }}} said the children will split their time between {{{ otherAdult }}}'s home and {{{ senderName }}}'s home.
livingAndVisiting.suggestedStayOvernight: {{{ senderName }}} suggested that the children stay overnight at {{{ adult }}}'s home.
livingAndVisiting.suggestedNoOvernights: {{{ senderName }}} suggested that overnights do not happen at this time.
livingAndVisiting.suggestedOvernightDays: {{{ senderName }}} suggested that overnight visits happen on {{ days }}.
livingAndVisiting.suggestedDaytimeVisits: {{{ senderName }}} suggested that the children do daytime visits to {{{ adult }}}'s home.
livingAndVisiting.suggestedNoDaytimeVisits: {{{ senderName }}} suggested that daytime visits do not happen at this time.
livingAndVisiting.suggestedDaytimeVisitDays: {{{ senderName }}} suggested that daytime visits happen on {{ days }}.

handoverAndHolidays.suggestedNoChangeDuringSchoolHolidays: {{{ senderName }}} suggested that these arrangements do not change during school holidays.

planLastMinuteChanges.howChangesCommunicated: {{{ senderName }}} suggested that last-minute changes should be communicated {{ methods }}.

planLongTermNotice.howChangesCommunicated: {{{ senderName }}} suggested that you should both give each other {{ numberOfWeeks }} weeks' notice to change long-term arrangements.

planReview.suggestedMonthsSingular: {{{ senderName }}} suggested that you should review this arrangement in 1 month's time.
planReview.suggestedYearsSingular: {{{ senderName }}} suggested that you should review this arrangement in 1 year's time.
planReview.suggestedMonthsPlural: {{{ senderName }}} suggested that you should review this arrangement in {{ number }} months' time.
planReview.suggestedYearsPlural: {{{ senderName }}} suggested that you should review this arrangement in {{ number }} years' time.

yourProposedPlan.nowSendPlan: Now send this proposed child arrangements plan back to {{{ senderName }}}. You should try to create a written record of what you have both agreed.
yourProposedPlan.notLegallyBinding: Any plan you make using this form is not legally binding. The other person does not have to do what it says and either of you can suggest changes to it at any time.
yourProposedPlan.unableToAgree: If you are unable to make an agreement between yourselves, you could try mediation or another way of agreeing outside of court.
yourProposedPlan.aMediatorIs: A mediator is a professional who will work with you to help you make decisions based on your child’s best interests. They listen to both of you and take a neutral approach.
yourProposedPlan.moreInfoAndSupport: More information and support is available at https://www.gov.uk/looking-after-children-divorce.
